display.purpose: Page titles. One per page, never repeated.

title.purpose: Table headers, form labels, inline section labels.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, table cell content.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and overlays. More blur, less offset. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Dialog/modals enter. Deceleration curve for reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Electric teal background, near-white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0d8f84; color: #f0fefa; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 16px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0a7a70; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d8f84; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Transparent with border stroke.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #171c2c; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid #dfe3eb; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 16px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f4f9; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d8f84; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-btn-outline { border-color: #2a3040; color: #eff1f5; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1c2130; } }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Flat, bordered, tonal elevation. No shadow at rest.
components.html:
Monthly expected earnings

Content here
components.css: .ds-card { background: #f9fafb; border: 1px solid #dfe3eb; border-radius: 8px; color: #171c2c; } .ds-card-header { padding: 24px 24px 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-content { padding: 16px 24px 24px; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-card { background: #1c2130; border-color: #2a3040; color: #eff1f5; } }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field. Transparent background, border stroke, teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #dfe3eb; border-radius: 6px; color: #171c2c; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7b8294; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #0d8f84; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(13, 143, 132, 0.3); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-input { border-color: #2a3040; color: #eff1f5; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9198a8; } }

components.name: Badge Muted
components.description: Muted category/status badge. Tonal fill with muted text.
components.css: .ds-badge-muted { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; background: #f1f4f9; color: #7b8294; border: 1px solid transparent; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-badge-muted { background: #2a3040; color: #9198a8; } }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Active state uses filled teal background.
components.html: DashboardSessions
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #7b8294; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f1f4f9; color: #171c2c; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d8f84; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-nav-active { background: #0d8f84; color: #f0fefa; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #0a7a70; color: #f0fefa; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-nav-item { color: #9198a8; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1c2130; color: #eff1f5; } .ds-nav-active { background: #0d8f84; color: #f0fefa; } .ds-nav-active:hover { background: #0a7a70; } }

narrative.overview: A drafting table under a single focused lamp. Every mark is deliberate. Shadows are soft and ambient, never sharp. Contrast carries the hierarchy. The tool recedes; the numbers stay. This system serves one job: making unpaid hours and owed money instantly legible. The palette is restrained, cool, and precise. One accent (electric teal) marks interactive elements and primary actions. Neutrals are tinted toward blue, never pure gray. Surfaces are flat with tonal shifts rather than shadows. Typography uses weight and size contrast, not color decoration. Components are tight, precise, and predictable.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color: one accent, tinted neutrals, semantic tones only where data demands
Flat by default: tonal layering for depth, no shadows at rest
Tight and precise: 4-6px radii, compact padding, dense information
Dark-native: both themes designed from scratch, not inversions
Numbers as the primary visual: weight and size carry the story, not color swatches
WCAG AAA contrast across all themes

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Electric teal is the only decorative accent. It marks primary buttons, active navigation, links, focus rings, and selection states. No other hue appears as surface decoration. Semantic colors appear only on data values and state indicators.

rules.name: The Weight-Step Rule
rules.body: Every level transition must include a weight jump of at least 200 (400 to 600, 600 to 700). Flat weight across sizes creates noise, not hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No elevation shadow on cards, no hover shadows on buttons, no shadow on tables. Modal lift is the only exception.

dos: Use electric teal as the single accent for all interactive elements
Use weight jumps (400 to 600 or 600 to 700) to create hierarchy
Use tonal shifts (4-6% lightness) between page background and card surfaces
Ensure all color pairs meet WCAG AAA contrast ratios
Use semantic colors exclusively on data values and state
Design dark and light themes as equal citizens, not inversions
donts: Use side-stripe borders (border-left/right wider than 1px) as colored accents on cards or rows
Create hero-metric cards: big number, small label, gradient accent
Apply gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient)
Use shadows on cards or buttons at rest
Use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff)
Use identical-card grids with the same icon-heading-text pattern
Animate CSS layout properties; state transitions at 150-250ms only
Use decorative motion that does not convey state
Use bright pastels, emoji, illustrations, or confetti
Use the accent color as a background fill for content areas
